title: Solid Coloured Blocks
description: blocks designed to help wiki devs
body:
This mod adds in the 16 blocks using the default block colours. It was specifically designed for wiki devs to be able to chromakey out backgrounds for isometric renders from an ingame perspective, however there are crafting recipes so it can work in survival mode

 

 

As of 1.20.6 this mod has now been merged with my other mod Gadget Lab
